name: coral
description: Coral marketplace — single plugin that bundles the Coral MCP server, three auto-invoked skills, and two slash commands for setting up and querying a Karpathy-style LLM wiki in any git repo.

plugins.name: coral
plugins.description: Coral wiki + multi-repo manifest + MCP server. Auto-invoked skills for bootstrap, query, and onboarding; slash commands for explicit control. Requires the `coral` binary on PATH (see https://github.com/agustincbajo/Coral#install).
